extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports proceedings against the Company of 1 criminal and 2 regulatory cases, against Directors of 4 criminal cases, and against Subsidiaries of 1 regulatory case; thus criminal against-count is 5 and regulatory against-count is 3, excluding all “by” rows. Tax proceedings involving the Company are 5 income-tax, 3 entry-tax, 5 customs/excise/service-tax and 6 VAT cases, totaling 19; no subsidiary tax row is reported. The group litigation amount is summed from quantified against-group rows: Company civil ₹47.65 million, Company regulatory ₹5.26 million, Subsidiary regulatory ₹12.00 million, and Company tax ₹304.88 million, totaling ₹369.79 million; the civil figure carries an asterisk for additional unquantifiable amounts. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹10,133.99 million as of December 31, 2017. Customer concentration is company-wide top-five clients for Fiscal 2017, at 97.83% of total income (not revenue from operations); all monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
